executives.name: Alan Boeckmann
executives.background: Mr. Boeckmann has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is the former Executive Chairman and CEO of Fluor Corporation.

executives.name: Nils Andersen
executives.background: Nils Andersen was appointed to the Supervisory Board in 2023 and became Chairman in 2024. He is the former CEO of A.P. Moller-Maersk and Carlsberg.

executives.name: Richard Heron
executives.background: Richard Heron is Chief Financial Officer of Cisco. He joined Cisco in 2024. Previously, he served as CFO of Luminar Technologies and held various senior finance roles at other technology companies.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President Health and Chief Medical Officer

executives.name: Paula Rosput Reynolds
executives.background: Paula Reynolds is the President and CEO of Preferential Ltd. She previously served as Vice Chairman and Chief Restructuring Officer of AIG and Chairman and CEO of Safeco Corporation.
